payload.title: Gate /sync push with authorizeUpload (on-behalf-of principal + write role)
payload.description: Wire authorizeUpload/authorizeUploadActors (src/auth_hosted/authz.js) into the /sync push endpoint (SCP-134): reject any event whose actor principal differs from the authenticated subject, or where the subject lacks write role on the target project. Map reject codes via statusForReject.
